title: TopoGlyph 10.0: Health Informatics Substrate Module
summary: A domain extension for representing the *data and information topology* of health informatics systems — the layered standards (FHIR, OMOP, openEHR, Phenopackets), terminology graphs (SNOMED/RxNorm/LOINC/HPO via UMLS), evidence representations (EBMonFHIR, GRADE, EvidenceMap), know…
